title: Team Foundation Server 2013 Customization
description: A hands-on guide to customizing key features of Team Foundation Server 2013 for collaborative enterprise software projects.
overview: Learn how to customize TFS and create useful plugins for your organization. This hands-on guide walks you through customizing process templates, increasing web access usability with JavaScript plugins, enhancing work items with custom controls, creating server plugins, building TFS scheduled jobs, and customizing build processes.
